result.packet_rationale: All rows are self-contained questions about which button or option in the Postal Vote/Postal Vote BD app sends an OTP, one-time code, verification code, or code. Minor typos, wording variation, and button/option synonyms do not change the intent. No row is generic, context-dependent, or better suited to a sibling tag.
